signal.title: 6 best AI agent frameworks (and how I picked one) in 2026
signal.summary: Overall, AutoGen is a compelling framework if you're an engineer or research team exploring multi-agent architectures. But if you just need to automate workflows or build a simple agent without managing infrastructure, there are more accessible options on this list. AutoGen is free and open-source. You can download it from GitHub and start building immediately. But you will need to pay for API calls to whatever AI models you use (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Claude, etc.).
